name: Bull-Leaper
uniques: Prevents spreading of religion to the city it is next to
Can generate a large amount of culture <upon ending a turn in a [City Center] tile>
Can remove other religions from cities <in [Friendly] tiles> <[5] times> <after which this unit is consumed>
Can be purchased for [300] [Faith] [in cities following our religion]
Can only be built <in cities with a [Anaktora]>

uniques.name: Kapte Galleys
uniques: May create improvements on water resources
Can undertake a trade mission with City-State, giving a large sum of gold and [15] Influence <if [Harbor] is constructed> <in [City-State] cities>
